Title: Micronaut vulnerable to DoS via crafted form-urlencoded body binding with descending array indices
Description: In `JsonBeanPropertyBinder::expandArrayToThreshold` in `io.micronaut:micronaut-json-core` before Micronaut 4 4.10.16 and in Micronaut 3 before 3.10.5 does not correctly handle descending array index order during form-urlencoded body binding, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (non-terminating loop, CPU exhaustion, and OutOfMemoryError) via crafted indexed form parameters (e.g., `authors[1].name` followed by `authors[0].name`).
AffectedVersions: All versions before 3.10.5, all versions starting from 4.0.0-M1 before 4.10.16
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 3.10.5 before 4.0.0-M1, all versions starting from 4.10.16
